title: Parted Curtains
writer: Bertram Bracken, James C. Bradford, Franklyn Hall
actors: Henry B. Walthall, Mary Alden, William Clifford
plot: A young man just released from prison can't find work because no employer will hire an ex-convict. Broke and hungry, he steals money off of a painter. The painter, however, takes pity on him and decides to help him get his life ba...
